title: galium reboudiana
intro: Galium reboudiana, also known as New Zealand tea tree or Beebalm, is a perennial herb native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective against infections and wounds. The health benefits of Galium reboudiana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Galium reboudiana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
